property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.0\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA app\NvDLISR;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\150\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\Client SDK\ODBC\170\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Windows Kits\10\Windows Performance Toolkit\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft SQL Server\160\DTS\Binn\;C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI\;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0\bin\;C:\Users\Brayan\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\MinGW\bin;C:\MinGW\msys\1.0\bin;C:\Users\Brayan\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\Brayan\.dotnet\tools;.

testcase.name: testModificar
testcase.system-out:
modificar 97 Insertando editorial con ID: 97 62 Insertando material para editorial con ID: 97
98 63 Insertando material para editorial con ID: 97
1 1 Tiene materiales DELETE FROM BIB_EDITORIAL WHERE ID_EDITORIAL=? 1 No existen materiales asociados a la editorial con ID: 98 DELETE FROM BIB_EDITORIAL WHERE ID_EDITORIAL=? 1
testcase.system-err: may. 09, 2025 10:09:56 P. M. com.syntaxerror.biblioteca.persistance.dao.impl.DAOImplBase ejecutarModificacionEnBD INFO: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.CallableStatement: INSERT INTO BIB_EDITORIAL(NOMBRE, SITIOWEB, PAIS) VALUES ('Editorial Planeta', 'https://www.planetadelibros.com', 'España') may. 09, 2025 10:09:58 P.
